title: Software License Agreement
contract_text: Software License Agreement between SoftCo and ClientX.

clauses.text: SoftCo grants ClientX a non-transferable license to use the Software.
Upon a change of control of ClientX, this license shall immediately and automatically terminate.
SoftCo's liability is limited to the fees paid in the preceding six months.
ClientX shall provide SoftCo with audit rights once per year on 30 days notice.
ClientX shall indemnify SoftCo for any third-party claims arising from ClientX's use.
